LanguageData.Outerm_Artificial.label: Artificial Race
LanguageData.Outerm_Artificial.description:
Outerms are an artificial race of unknown origin.
Like other artificial races, they slowly grow stronger over time.

The mechanism behind that growth remains unexplained,
and some theories claim the power comes from a higher plane.

Their level increases by 1 roughly once per year. (Maximum level: 10)
